rows.CNzh: <unk[3:0:11]>真是惊人……<unk[5:0]>这就已经滑得比我们还快了……！
rows.TWzh: <unk[3:0:11]>太驚人了……<unk[5:0]>你居然比我們還快……！

<unk[3:0:11]>I don't believe it. <unk[5:0]>You're faster than

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>喂喂，真的假的……<unk[5:0]>看来用不了多久，

rows.USen:

like that, you're right on the edge of

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>今后你也要多加练习，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Keep on practicing and I know you'll hit
even greater heights!<PageBreak>But enough of that. <unk[5:0]>Here's your shield.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>和我们的成绩差不多呢！<unk[5:0]>
看来你会成为不错的劲敌！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>跟我們的成績差不多呢！<unk[5:0]>
看來你會是不錯的勁敵！
rows.JPja:

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>That's close to our times! <unk[5:0]>Looks like our
rivalry is about to heat up.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>このタイムで まだ<Ruby={4:8}まんぞく>満足はしてないよな？<unk[5:0]>
お<Ruby={2:4}たが>互い <Ruby={4:6}がんば>頑張って<Ruby={2:2}い>行こうぜ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>It's a good time, but I bet you're not
satisfied with it. <unk[5:0]>Why settle, right? Let's
both keep pushing our limits!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>更新纪录固然重要，

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>刷新記錄固然重要，

<Ruby={2:4}わる>悪くないタイムだから <Ruby={4:6}じしん>自信をもってね

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>It is important to always try to beat your
personal best, but that's not a bad time.
You should be proud!<PageBreak>And to prove it, I've got a shield for you.

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Not great, but not bad, I guess. <unk[5:1]>There's
a few more hitches to work out in your
technique, but you'll get there.

rows.CNzh: <unk[3:0:7]>简而言之，就是成长的路还很长的意思。

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>このまま<Ruby={4:10}れんしゅう>練習を<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続ければ

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Keep practicing and you should post some

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>你正处于成绩不断上升的成长阶段……<unk[5:0]>

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>目前你還在成長階段，往後記錄會漸入佳境……<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>You're at a place now where you're ripe
for quick advancement. <unk[5:0]>This shield is a

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>你不用着急，<unk[5:0]>

rows.TWzh:

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I know we're all trying to go fast, but

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>It takes experience to get good, no matter

rows.CNzh:

所以這面盾牌就給你當作獎勵吧。

rows.USen:

rows.CNzh:

rows.CNzh:

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>我想想……<unk[5:1]>其他建议的话……<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>从这里往下坡走一段的地方……<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Let's see... <unk[5:1]>What other advice can I
give you?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>You know where Russ stands during

course, then down into the ravine, you'll

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>All my instincts as a veteran shield surfer
tell me that if you could somehow pass
through that <Color=red>cave<Color=white>, then surely...

<unk[3:0:267]>…<unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>って <Ruby={2:4}わす>忘れてちょうだい！<PageBreak><unk[3:0:256]><Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分が<Ruby={4:8}そうなん>遭難した<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所に <Ruby={4:6}かわい>可愛い<Ruby={4:4}でし>弟子を<Ruby={2:6}みちび>導くなんて

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>Actually, no. Forget I said that.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:256]>A good teacher wouldn't lead her devoted

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>踩盾滑行的世界，是非常欢迎新事物的……<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}たて>盾サーフィンの<Ruby={4:6}せかい>世界は <Ruby={2:6}あたら>新しいことに<Ruby={4:8}かんよう>寛容だ…<unk[5:1]>

surf down mountains and soar over 'em?

rows.CNzh:

也得用那種能在<Color=red>一瞬間就準備好<Color=white>的才有意義……

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:6}ふたり>2人はこう<Ruby={2:2}い>言うけど…<unk[5:0]> レース<Ruby={2:6}ちゅう>中に<Ruby={2:2}の>乗り<Ruby={2:4}もの>物なんか

とてもレースには <Ruby={2:4}つか>使えそうにないわね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Whatever these two knuckleheads say,<unk[5:0]>
assembling a contraption to use during a
race sounds like a good way to lose time.<PageBreak>I don't see the benefit to any other kind
of conveyance unless you could <Color=red>put one
together in an instant<Color=white>.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>反正，只要你有什么新想法，

纪念盾牌已经送给你了，<unk[5:0]>
那么这次就请收下这个吧！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>不過你有什麼想法的話
就盡量去試試看吧！
既然記念盾牌已經送給你了，<unk[5:0]>
那就收下這份謝禮吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>まあ <Ruby={2:4}おも>思いついたことがあれば
いろいろと<Ruby={2:4}ため>試してみるといいわ！
さっ <Ruby={4:8}けいひん>景品の<Ruby={2:4}たて>盾は もう<Ruby={2:4}わた>渡しちゃってるし<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:2}か>代わりにこれを<Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取って！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>But who knows? If you think you have a
good idea, try it! That's how the sport of
shield surfing advances!<PageBreak>I've already given you your prize shield,<unk[5:0]>
so you get something else instead.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>莫非……<unk[5:0]>
你在中途捡了盾？
<unk[3:0:263]>我记得你的行李在挑战开始前还有空间，
现在却突然满了。
在你收下纪念盾牌之前，
指导就先暂停吧。
<unk[3:0:0]>等你整理好行李，做好收下盾牌的准备之后，
就再来找我吧。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>難道……<unk[5:0]>
你在途中撿到了盾牌？
<unk[3:0:263]>我記得在出發前你的行李還有空位，
怎麼不知不覺間就裝滿了啊？
在你可以收下記念盾牌之前，
下一次的指導就先暫停吧。
<unk[3:0:0]>等你整理完行李，做好收下盾牌的準備後，
再來跟我說一聲吧。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>もしかして あなた…<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:8}とちゅう>途中で <Ruby={2:4}たて>盾を<Ruby={2:4}ひろ>拾ったりした？
<unk[3:0:263]>スタート<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前は <Ruby={4:6}にもつ>荷物に<Ruby={2:2}あ>空きがあったはずが
いつの<Ruby={2:2}ま>間にか いっぱいになってるじゃない
<Ruby={4:6}きねん>記念の<Ruby={2:4}たて>盾を <Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取ってもらえるまで
<Ruby={2:4}つぎ>次の<Ruby={4:6}しどう>指導は ひとまずおあずけね
<unk[3:0:0]><Ruby={4:6}にもつ>荷物を<Ruby={4:6}せいり>整理して <Ruby={2:4}たて>盾を<Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取る<Ruby={4:8}じゅんび>準備ができたら
もう<Ruby={4:6}いちど>一度 <Ruby={2:6}わたし>私に<Ruby={2:4}こえ>声をかけてもらえるかしら？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>What the—<unk[5:0]> Did you pick up another shield
along the way?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>I thought I remembered you having space
in your pouch before the run, but now it
seems like you don't.<PageBreak>I wouldn't feel great about taking your
money again for another lesson until you
get your shield for this one.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:0]>Why don't you talk to me again once
you've figured out your shield situation
so you can accept the reward?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>怎么样？<unk[5:0]>如果你还有意向的话，
要让我再看一次你的滑行身姿吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>如何？<unk[5:0]>如果你還想挑戰的話，
要不要我再幫你看一次你的滑行表現啊？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>どう？<unk[5:0]> もしも やる<Ruby={2:2}き>気があるなら
もう<Ruby={4:6}いちど>一度 あなたの<Ruby={2:4}すべ>滑りを<Ruby={2:2}み>見てあげましょうか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>So what do you say? <unk[5:0]>I wouldn't mind
watching you surf again to give you a
few pointers.

rows.JPja: やっぱり やめる
rows.USen: Actually, never mind.

rows.JPja: やめておきます
rows.USen: I'll pass.

rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:10}しょきゅう>初級コースにします
rows.USen: Put me back at beginner.
<unk[4:0:20 67 97 108 108 70 97 114 95 48 49]>Hurry to the finish line!
<unk[4:0:20 67 97 108 108 70 97 114 95 48 48]>Go for it! Just a little more!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>哇哇！<unk[5:1]>你在老师的课上做什么呢！<unk[5:1]>
赶快往终点前进啊！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>哇哇！<unk[5:1]>你在老師的教學中做什麼啊！<unk[5:1]>
快點往終點前進啊！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]>わわっ！<unk[5:1]> <Ruby={4:8}せんせい>先生のレッスン<Ruby={2:6}ちゅう>中に<Ruby={2:4}なに>何してるのさ！<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:4}いそ>急いでゴールに<Ruby={2:2}む>向かいなよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>Whoa! Hey! <unk[5:1]>Don't waste face time with
Coach talking to me! <unk[5:1]>Move it and head
for the finish line!

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:9]>ホラ！<unk[5:1]> ボクのことはほっといて <Ruby={2:4}いそ>急ぎなよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>C'mon! <unk[5:1]>Don't waste your time on me.
Get to the goal!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>呜哇……！<unk[5:1]>你在干什么啊！<unk[5:1]>
怎么可以在这种地方停下来啊！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>嗚哇……！<unk[5:1]>你在幹什麼啊！<unk[5:1]>
怎麼可以在這種地方停下來！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]>うおっ…！<unk[5:1]> アンタ<Ruby={2:4}なに>何してるんだ！<unk[5:1]>
こんなとこで <Ruby={2:2}と>止まってちゃダメだろ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>Huh? <unk[5:1]>What're you doing?! <unk[5:1]>There's no
time to chat on a run down the slopes!

rows.CNzh: <unk[3:0:9]>喂……大姐的课还没结束呢！<unk[5:1]>赶快走啊！
rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:9]>オイ… <Ruby={2:4}ねえ>姐さんのレッスン<Ruby={2:6}ちゅう>中だ！<unk[5:1]> <Ruby={2:4}はや>早く<Ruby={2:2}い>行けよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>Hey! Don't talk to me when Teach is
watching! <unk[5:1]>You'll make me look bad.

rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:8}きょうぎ>競技をやめたい
rows.USen: I want to quit.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>咦……<unk[5:0]>不是还在竞技中途吗？<PageBreak><unk[3:0:0]>现在放弃的话，<Color=red>20卢比<Color=white>的指导费用也不会退还。<unk[5:0]>
即便如此也要放弃吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>咦……<unk[5:0]>明明還在競技中呢？<PageBreak><unk[3:0:0]>就算現在放棄，我也不會退還學費的<Color=red>20盧比<Color=white>。
即使這樣還是要放棄嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]>え…<unk[5:0]> まだ<Ruby={4:8}きょうぎ>競技の<Ruby={4:8}とちゅう>途中なのに？<PageBreak><unk[3:0:0]>ここでやめても <Ruby={6:12}しどうりょう>指導料の<Color=red>20ルピー<Color=white>は
<Ruby={2:4}かえ>返せないけど それでも いいかしら？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>Quit? <unk[5:0]>In the middle of a session?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:0]>Well, if you want, but you won't get the
<Color=red>20 rupees<Color=white> from your instruction fee back.<unk[5:0]>
So are you sure about quitting?

rows.JPja: それでも やめます
rows.USen: Yeah, I'm done.

rows.CNzh: <unk[3:0:7]>我知道了……<unk[5:0]>那就下次继续努力吧！

rows.USen:

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}なん>何でもないです
rows.USen: Never mind.

rows.JPja: やっぱり<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続けます
rows.USen: No, I'll keep going.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我知道了！<unk[5:1]>
那就请你继续努力吧！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我明白了！<unk[5:1]>
請你繼續加油吧！

<Ruby={2:2}ひ>引き<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続き <Ruby={4:6}がんば>頑張ってちょうだいね！

rows.USen:
